de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl

Class AbstractElement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.AbstractElement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer, SymbolicAssociation, SymbolicEquivalenceClass, SymbolicLayout, SymbolicValue

    public abstract class AbstractElement
extends java.lang.Object
implements ISymbolicElement
    Default implementation of ISymbolicElement.

      • formatTerm
